entry.title: New: Bill 69, CD1 (2024) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE TO CHANGE ZONING FROM URBAN RESERVE DISTRICT TO B-CT COUNTRY TOWN BUSINESS DISTRICT (CONDITIONAL ZONING) FOR 21,711 SQUARE FEET IN HĀNA, MAUI, HAWAIʻI, IDENTIFIED AS TAX MAP KEY (2) 1-4-013:001 (HĀNA STORE STORAGE BUILDING)"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
